name: w3schools-html-quiz
task: Take this 40-question HTML quiz. The quiz is already on screen — Question 1 of 40. For each question: (1) read the question stem in the visible text section, (2) click the radio button for the answer you believe is correct based on standard HTML knowledge, (3) click the button labeled 'Next ❯' to advance to the next question. After Question 40 the page will show a final score like 'You answered X out of 40 questions correctly'. When you see that score, emit done with the score string as the result. Important: the answer choices appear as 'radio' elements in the interactive list AND in the visible text section (read both). After clicking a radio, you must ALWAYS click 'Next ❯' before reading the next question.
